# CWE-613: Insufficient Session Expiration (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-613-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

var revokedSessions = map[string]struct{}{}

// Safe: short-lived cookie and server-side revocation on logout.
func LoginHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sid := r.FormValue("session_id")
	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{Name: "sid", Value: sid, MaxAge: 900, Path: "/", Secure: true, HttpOnly: true})
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}

func LogoutHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	c, _ := r.Cookie("sid")
	if c != nil && c.Value != "" {
		revokedSessions[c.Value] = struct{}{}
	}
	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{Name: "sid", Value: "", MaxAge: -1, Path: "/", Secure: true, HttpOnly: true})
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}

func ProtectedHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	c, err := r.Cookie("sid")
	if err != nil || c.Value == "" {
		http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	if _, revoked := revokedSessions[c.Value]; revoked {
		http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	_ = time.Now()
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"data":"secret"}`))
}
